title: ADR file frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter required on every docs/ADR/adr-NNN-*.md file.

title.description: Must start with ADR-NNN: prefix; wrap in quotes.

status.description: proposed until reviewed, accepted for active decisions, deprecated or superseded when replaced.

date.description: Creation date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Do not update on subsequent edits.

superseded_by.description: Only when status is superseded; value is the replacement ADR name (e.g., adr-002).

path.description: Relative path to a .context/ file that motivated the decision.

context.description: List of relative paths to .context/ files that motivated the decision. Omit the field entirely if none.
